name: Primal Instinct
description:
Dinosaurs? I like dinosaurs, do you like dinosaurs? I bet you do if you're here. As you can see, Dinosaurs. This is as it says inspired by The Isle. Expect updates, and GIVE ME SUGGESTIONS! I plan on trying to add more advanced mechanics like hunger and thirst? and almost certainly some more dinosaurs. And sorry if it's a bit basic right, this is my third attempt at making a bot.

Update 1; the current list of prehistoric fauna on the island is- Tyrannosaurus rex, Acrocanthosaurus, Ceratosaurus, Allosaurus, Deinonychus, Triceratops, Gallimimus, Dilophosaurus, Dryosaurus, Deinosuchus, and Camarasaurus. (Update 1 added Dryosaurus, Deinosuchus, Acrocanthosaurus, and Camarasaurus)

Update 2; I added four more intros apart from the first one, just to add some variety.

Update 3; I have added a bare-bones hunger and thirst system. But, also added Cryodrakon and Irritator to sweeten the update.
creator: Tarabaks_King_RAWA
